_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
clinical_indications: Presence of thyrotoxicosis with elevated levels of free triiodothyronine (FT3) or free thyroxine (FT4)
Central nervous system (CNS) manifestations: Restlessness, delirium, mental aberration/psychosis, somnolence/lethargy, coma
Tachycardia (heart rate ≥ 130 beats per minute or atrial fibrillation with heart rate ≥ 130)
Congestive heart failure (CHF) manifestations: Pulmonary edema, moist rales, cardiogenic shock, or severe classification (Class IV NYHA or ≥ Class III Killip)
Gastrointestinal (GI)/hepatic manifestations: nausea, vomiting, diarrhea, or elevated total bilirubin level

clinical_thresholds.note: Heart rate threshold for tachycardia or atrial fibrillation
Total bilirubin level threshold for GI/hepatic manifestations

preauth.label: Clinical Notes including evaluation findings, indications for the procedure, advise for admission and planned line of treatment
Thyroid stimulating hormone, Free triiodothyonine (FT3), Free Thyroxine (FT4)

claim.label: Detailed Indoor case papers with treatment details
Post treatment Thyroid stimulating hormone, Free triiodothyonine (FT3), Free Thyroxine (FT4)

ppd_preauth.q: Was the report of FT3, FT4, TSH show raised thyroid level?

common_queries: FT3, FT4, or TSH report does not show raised thyroid levels at pre-authorization
Missing Thyroid stimulating hormone, Free triiodothyonine (FT3), or Free Thyroxine (FT4) reports at pre-authorization
Missing Thyroid Ultrasound scan at pre-authorization
Radionuclide Iodine uptake study report not submitted at claim stage
Post-treatment Thyroid stimulating hormone, Free triiodothyonine (FT3), or Free Thyroxine (FT4) reports not submitted at claim stage

additional_information.min_doctor_qualification_desirable: DNB / MD / or Equivalent (in General Medicine / Pediatric Medicine)
clinical_key_pointers: Proceed with Thyrotoxic crisis only if diagnosis made is backed by clinical manifestation:
